did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper presents a deterministic, constraint-driven non-linear least-squares optimization algorithm for camera view planning and pose optimization on collaborative robots. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning methods to obtain results; the optimization is mathematical and geometric rather than data-driven or learned.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
